mapper.select: SELECT permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, description, resource, action, created_at FROM permissions WHERE permission_id = #{permissionId}
SELECT permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, description, resource, action, created_at FROM permissions WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode}
SELECT permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, description, resource, action, created_at FROM permissions WHERE resource = #{resource} ORDER BY action
SELECT permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, description, resource, action, created_at FROM permissions ORDER BY resource, action

SELECT p.permission_id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.description, p.resource, p.action, p.created_at FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.resource, p.action
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permissions (permission_id, permission_code, permission_name, description, resource, action, created_at) VALUES (#{permissionId}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{description}, #{resource}, #{action}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM permissions WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode})
